TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bud Acton nalecuhan i Troy, Michigan, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bud Acton i 1985 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 40, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput putiput. tatama, nalecuhan ciniza i 1942 a mihcan1 a bulad 11 a demiad.
S.PHON: bud aʦton nar~ɾəʦuħan i troj, miʦħigan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bud aʦton i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dar~ɾr~ɾas ma*əriʦks putiput putiput. tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i **** a miħʦan* a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad.
S.FORM: Bud Acton nalecuhan i Troy, Michigan, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bud Acton i 1985 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 40, namapili' tu nu Dallas Mavericks putiput putiput. tatama, nalecuhan ciniza i 1942 a mihcan1 a bulad 11 a demiad.
S.PHON: bud aʦton nar~ɾəʦuħan i troj, miʦħigan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bud aʦton i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu dar~ɾr~ɾas ma*əriʦks putiput putiput. tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i **** a miħʦan* a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad.
